title: pellaea nudiuscula
intro: Pellaea nudiuscula, also known as the button fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pellaea nudiuscula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
